description: Update the eQUEST project parameters to reflect a relocation of the 4StoreyBuilding to Memphis, TN (ASHRAE Climate Zone 3A). Modify the project-level Site and Build parameters to set the Altitude to 285 ft and the State to 24 (Tennessee). Update the 12 monthly undisturbed ground temperatures (GROUND-T) for January through December to the following values: 48, 50, 55, 62, 70, 77, 81, 81, 75, 65, 55, 49. Run the full annual DOE-2.2 simulation and save the project.
